title: Ubiquiti UISP-S, UISP Switch
description: UISP-S is an ideal switch for deployment between ISP providers. It is a L2 PoE switch without fans, with 8x Gigabit LAN and one SFP port for further expansion using optical fiber. The UISP Switch is a cost-effective solution where gigabit wireless speeds are needed quickly and affordably. With a total 110W PoE budget and a maximum of 30W/port, the switch provides considerable power to each connected radio in the PoE ports. For larger deployments, pair it with UISP Console to create a cohesive… (8) Gigabit LAN with support for passive 27V PoE and power supply via 2 or 4 pairs of wires (1) 1Gb SFP port 110W PoE budget, max. 30W/port Silent operation without a fan Mounting on the wall - the kit is included in the package Easy setup using Bluetooth via mobile app UISP 1.4.0-beta.11 and above Device Power cord Power adapter 27V / 4.4A Wall mounting kit
